TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tatoba' = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Tatoba'. 159 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 407 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 360 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 47 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 60%, Saysiyat 27%, Amis 1%.
S.PHON: = tatoba' = gaga mniq sinʦusən u*uŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ tatoba'. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat **%, amis *%.
S.FORM: = Tatoba' = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Tatoba'. 159 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 407 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 360 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 47 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 60%, Saysiyat 27%, Amis 1%.
S.PHON: = tatoba' = gaga mniq sinʦusən u*uŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ tatoba'. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat **%, amis *%.
